title: Baremetal Platform
description: Baremetal platform settings. Specify {} for all defaults.

ironic.title: Ironic
ironic.description: Ironic/Metal3 provisioning operator settings. Applied via the Provisioning CR on the hub cluster.

provisioningNetwork.title: Provisioning Network
provisioningNetwork.description: Ironic provisioning network mode. Disabled uses the machine network — no dedicated provisioning VLAN required.

watchAllNamespaces.title: Watch All Namespaces
watchAllNamespaces.description: Allow BareMetalHost provisioning in all namespaces, not just openshift-machine-api.

disableVirtualMediaTLS.title: Disable Virtual Media TLS
disableVirtualMediaTLS.description: Disable TLS for Ironic virtual media. Required for BMC vendors (e.g. Supermicro) that cannot validate self-signed certificates.

hardwareInspection.title: Hardware Inspection
hardwareInspection.description: Run hardware inventory before provisioning. Set false to skip — faster provisioning but no hardware inventory data.

diskCleanup.title: Disk Cleanup
diskCleanup.description: Wipe disk partition tables before provisioning. Set false to preserve existing disk contents.
